base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_varia_suit — a pickup_item (currency) from 1986 metroid. Varia Suit — powerup that reduces damage. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Varia Suit — powerup that reduces damage; changes Samus's color palette to orange/gold
